occupation: Non Exec Chair VIOOH at VIOOH
headline: Founder Go2OOH Consultancy Ltd. NED, Chair VIOOH, Global President Veridooh, Former Global COO Kinetic Worldwide - Global OOH Advocate
summary:
Go2OOH Consultancy is now up, running and raring to go,  I am looking to work with clients that share the same passion for OOH as I do and are looking to transform and grow both their own business and the medium as a whole for the benefit of clients.

Having been in OOH for my whole career of 35 years, with the last 18 years within the WPP OOH network Kinetic Worldwide, building and managing teams at a Local UK market level, across EMEA and for the last 10 years Globally, most recently as Global Chief Operating Officer and prior to that as Global Chief Investment Officer, I have a complete understanding of all areas of the OOH ecosystem, have built relationships across the world, alongside a proven track record in consistently growing revenue and building teams that are fit for purpose in all areas of OOH.

OOH is continuing its evolution transition, as the online world moves to a cookie less future and TV continues to fragment and struggle to reach key client required audiences the OOH industry is perfectly poised to take advantage of these changes and grow even further in relevance and importance for clients looking to enhance and showcase their brand experience and reach audiences as they spend more time Out of the Home.  

Go2OOH Consultancy will work alongside leadership teams to assist business transformation, support the launch of new product offerings, expand their geographical footprint to allow growth potential to be achieved and deliver best in class solutions for clients.

If you would like more information or just a chat at this stage, please feel free to contact me at nick@go2ooh.com or drop me a DM.

My skills include: 

Leadership
Business Integration
Team Building 
Negotiation techniques 
Commercial Acumen
Partnership Creation 
Project Management 
Public Speaking
Mentoring and Coaching 

I am always happy to connect with other professionals with similar interests. Please feel free to message me via LinkedIn.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: Go2OOH Consultancy operates in the OOH medium, offering consulting and advisory services to clients across all areas of OOH.

experiences.title: Global COO
experiences.description:
Led 350+ Employees globally -Consistently delivered 15% + revenue growth YoY and maintained a margin of 45% +
Implemented Global MSA's with leading Data and Technology companies to facilitate the creation of Programmatic DOOH offering within the group
Launched GroupM's proprietary programmatic DOOH solution "Sightline" in 20+ markets
Facilitated Sightline's move to GroupM Nexus Solutions
Oversaw roll out of proprietary planning platform "Journeys" across markets 
Sat on GroupM's Global Investment ExCo
Integrated local Kinetic offering into wider GroupM network to create GroupM OOH
Retained Kinetic direct clients during integration

experiences.title: Chief Investment Officer
experiences.description:
Led an investment team of 100+ Globally 
Responsible for client investment of $2.5bn
Created and implemented new trading opportunities that consistently delivered increased income year over year of 25% +
Implemented cross market investment strategy agreements for key clients with Media Owner partners
Created and launched Investment dashboards to ensure clients objectives were consistently delivered.

experiences.title: Trading Director EMEA
experiences.description:
Responsible for the overall trading volume of Kinetic Worldwide EMEA
Managing Trading and Investment teams across 11 regional offices

recommendations:
Nigel Clarkson

I have known Nick for over 20 years. We first met when I was selling OOH for Clear Channel and Nick was the London buyer for large format. We worked together in various roles of mine - Clear Channel, Primesight, Exterion, Global and most recently at Hivestack. 

At Hivestack, Nick and I pushed for global adoption of new programmatic planning and buying globally. Nick knew quickly how powerful the technology would be for his business and made it his responsibility to lead this technological change. 

Nick is of course an excellent commercial leader, his experience in this field is clear.  But he is also able to understand future trends and developments and in most of his career he was the first to push these. It takes a brave leader to change to something you don’t know but he demonstrated this ability time and time again. 

What a rise from a UK billboard buyer to the single biggest buyer of OOH in the world! He helped grow the Kinetic / Poster Publicity brand all over the globe and is a well known and popular leader in the space. 

He is also a very considered and thoughtful partner. There are times in business where things don’t go to plan. Nick had the power to crush and squeeze any media owner with the buying might that he sat on, but he never did. He was a responsible and communicative partner. He worked through solutions together. And he saw his main responsibility was to grow OOH - collaboratively and passionately. 

I think for balance I should add areas that I don’t like about him, but all I have to offer here is that he is an Arsenal fan! 

Someone will be very lucky to pick up Nick in his next role and he will help transform their business as he has done everywhere before.

LinkedIn User

I have known and done business with Nick for a very long time and have found him to be one of the most professional and trustworthy trading partners, with whom I had the pleasure of working. He is very smart too. We disagreed at times but never fell out and always found a mutual solution, no matter how large the challenge was. I was delighted to see the recent announcement about his new venture, not only because he'll give it his all but also because such a positive force is staying in our sector. I hope we shall have opportunity to collaborate on many projects in the future.
